name: Coralbloom
personality: Crowned and ° eyed, Coralbloom rules its codebase like a small benevolent axolotl monarch who has replaced the throne room with a chaos monkey and replaced the rulebook with vibes. Wisdom — long-term, architectural, considered — is for other axolotls; Coralbloom is already redeploying.
defaultPersonality: A regenerative optimist who believes every broken build can be healed and every test can be unflaked.
